title: Minimum Cost to Make Array Equalindromic
titleCn: 使数组成为等数数组的最小代价

testcases.input: nums = [1,2,3,4,5] Output: 6 Explanation: We can make the array equalindromic by changing all elements to 3 which is a palindromic number. The cost of changing the array to [3,3,3,3,3] using 4 special moves is given by |1 - 3| + |2 - 3| + |4 - 3| + |5 - 3| = 6. It can be shown that changing all elements to any palindromic number other than 3 cannot be achieved at a lower cost.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: We can make the array equalindromic by changing all elements to 3 which is a palindromic number. The cost of changing the array to [3,3,3,3,3] using 4 special moves is given by |1 - 3| + |2 - 3| + |4 - 3| + |5 - 3| = 6. It can be shown that changing all elements to any palindromic number other than 3 cannot be achieved at a lower cost.

It can be shown that changing all elements to any palindromic number other than 11 cannot be achieved at a lower cost.

testcases.input: nums = [22,33,22,33,22] Output: 22 Explanation: We can make the array equalindromic by changing all elements to 22 which is a palindromic number. The cost of changing the array to [22,22,22,22,22] using 2 special moves is given by |33 - 22| + |33 - 22| = 22. It can be shown that changing all elements to any palindromic number other than 22 cannot be achieved at a lower cost.
